_notes.db_selector: /run cas -> db.default ('demo' = cas_demo.db). /run cas cas -> cas.db. /run cas pitch -> cas_pitch.db. The db-key is the 2nd positional arg to /run; it maps to db.instances.<key>.file. The dev server picks the DB by /run pre-setting env_var (SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI) before launch -- flask_app.py's load_dotenv(override=False) lets the pre-set env win over .env.
_notes.reset_rule: reset-database may wipe ONLY an instance with resettable:true AND whose file matches *_demo.db. Today only 'demo' (cas_demo.db) qualifies. cas.db/cas_pitch.db are never resettable. NOTE (2026-07-05): cas_demo.db now holds a LOCAL COPY of RIC's migrated COA (renamed from ric.db at user request); the user treats it as a DISPOSABLE local/test DB -- the authoritative RIC data lives on PythonAnywhere, so a /reset-database wipe of cas_demo.db is recoverable by re-pulling from PA.
_notes.cas_demo_db: cas_demo.db EXISTS. On 2026-07-05 the local ric.db was RENAMED to cas_demo.db at user request; it holds RIC's migrated COA (~367 accounts, no transactions) as a disposable LOCAL copy (PythonAnywhere is authoritative). The prior SavorPack demo was preserved as cas_demo.savorpack-bak-20260705-170811.db in instance/.
_notes.live_dbs: cas_pitch.db = pitch snapshot. The 'ric' instance was REMOVED 2026-07-05 (local ric.db renamed to cas_demo.db); the real, authoritative RIC client data now lives only on PythonAnywhere and is not a local /run instance.
_notes.python: CAS has a venv with pytest + pytest-xdist. zhiyuan has none (PATH python).
